125138.explanation: In principle not, unless the subject lends itself to it.

125141.explanation: This depends greatly on the specific situation.

125144.explanation: We will not cooperate with any desired expansion or extension.

125146.explanation: It is an important cause of fine dust, which is very harmful to public health.

125147.explanation: It is no longer appropriate today. Dressing warmly or using a blanket seems better to us.

125150.explanation: It is often very loud now without us seeing any added value. It also causes nuisance and is not very healthy.

125151.explanation: This seems more a responsibility of the entrepreneurs to us.

125154.explanation: We consider this a good investment.

125158.explanation: Unfortunately, it is necessary. And it would be good if the community officers (BOA’s) receive more powers.

125159.explanation: It can be useful, but we find it too much of an infringement on the privacy of our residents.

125162.explanation: There is a need for this and it frees up homes for families.

125163.explanation: A mix of permanent residence and tourism detracts from the attractiveness of the parks and is therefore bad for Vaals.

125164.explanation: Better to first choose infill development. Enough nature has already been sacrificed.

125166.explanation: We do not believe the residents of Vaals should bear the costs for that.

125167.explanation: We find the current income limit sufficient.

125171.explanation: This conflicts with the integration policy.

125173.explanation: This is not an end in itself.

125174.explanation: It is reasonable that the costs are borne by dog owners.

125175.explanation: This already aligns with that of the other Heuvelland municipalities.

125179.explanation: It is better that the polluter pays.

125184.explanation: It is an important part of Vaals' culture and identity.

125185.explanation: Now that we no longer have a police station, this seems a bad idea to us.

125189.explanation: In Vaals, there are many cars that are not even allowed to drive into the Netherlands. Let's tackle those first.

125191.explanation: This should not be mandatory, but we do want to offer financial support if a school chooses to do so.

125192.explanation: We can look into this, but it should not be obligatory.

125194.explanation: This seems good for the entrepreneurs of Vaals.

125137.explanation: Because the executive board should reflect society and society is best served by a mixed board, according to CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers.

125138.explanation: Residents of Vaals get the opportunity to express their opinions through participation processes. As CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers, we support these participation processes.

125141.explanation: According to CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers, farmers are important partners in preserving our beautiful nature and food supply, so it is important that farms can continue to exist.

125144.explanation: We have opened a shelter in our municipality for five years, and CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers believes we must adhere to this agreement.

125146.explanation: CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers believes that stoves are allowed as long as they are not harmful to health.

125147.explanation: The municipality of Vaals is a gastronomic and tourist municipality par excellence, where according to CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers everyone is welcome on a terrace.

125150.explanation: Festivals and celebrations are part of society and foster connection. CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers is not in favor of stricter rules.

125151.explanation: It is important that buildings in our municipality are accessible to all residents. If entrepreneurs need financial support for this, they can count on the municipality according to CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers.

125154.explanation: The school buildings are fairly new and in good condition. Investment is not currently necessary according to CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers.

125158.explanation: We already have many BOA’s in Vaals. An expansion could benefit families in difficult situations or help detect cannabis plantations or drug labs, according to CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers.

125159.explanation: The municipality of Vaals is a border municipality with a lot of cross-border traffic. CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers would like to see camera surveillance.

125162.explanation: The population of Vaals is aging and we need to prepare for that. Additionally, elderly people move on to suitable housing, freeing up their homes for young people, this is CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers’ position.

125163.explanation: Holiday homes are intended for vacations and should remain so according to CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers.

125164.explanation: In the municipality of Vaals, building outside village boundaries is not allowed. This has been determined by the province. CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers believes the province could be more flexible with the so-called contours.

125166.explanation: Residents with low incomes can count on the support of CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers.

125167.explanation: The income limit for schemes is currently 120%, and CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers agrees with that. Residents with higher incomes who have financial problems are also helped and supported by the municipality.

125171.explanation: Freedom of choice is considered a great good according to CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers.

125173.explanation: According to CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers, the property tax (ozb) should increase with the inflation rate.

125174.explanation: The dog tax is a fixed part of our local taxes and should remain so, according to CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers.

125175.explanation: Tourist tax should also increase with the inflation percentage according to the views of CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers.

125179.explanation: Waste disposal is already partly free, and what requires payment can remain as it is, according to CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers.

125184.explanation: In our municipality, there is attention for dialects in schools and childcare. CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers believes that our dialects belong to our identity and therefore supports initiatives that promote speaking dialect.

125185.explanation: According to CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers, there should be no coffee shop in the municipality of Vaals.

125189.explanation: There are sufficient parking spaces in the center of Vaals, especially in the parking garage, according to CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers.

125191.explanation: The municipality is in conversation with schools about the type of support schools and thus the children need. CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers believes we must connect with the needs and not impose anything. If there is a need for a breakfast, we will support that.

125192.explanation: In our municipality, there is a private provider working on this, and CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers supports this provider.

125194.explanation: CDA Vaals Vijlen Lemiers believes that one hour of free parking is good for entrepreneurs in Vaals and benefits our residents who shop in their own center.

125137.explanation: It is important to strive for a council that reflects society proportionally. The ratio of men/women and young/old should preferably be equal.

125138.explanation: Nuj Lies finds citizen participation extremely important. Therefore, we have strongly focused on strengthening active citizenship in recent years. A referendum can be a good instrument for this, depending on the topic of the issue.

125141.explanation: There must be tailor-made solutions here. We mainly have small-scale farms that should primarily be able to continue farming. In the transition to sustainable agriculture, it may be desirable to allow other functions.

125144.explanation: We are committed to a 5-year reception period. After this period, this demand arises again: currently, we cannot do otherwise because contracts have been concluded with the national government and the COA.

125150.explanation: Nuj Lies wants less regulatory pressure around events: Vaals must bloom again.

125151.explanation: This is primarily a responsibility for the entrepreneur, with the municipality able to facilitate.

125154.explanation: Education is one of the most important themes for Nuj Lies.

125162.explanation: This is important given the increasing aging population and to promote flow in the housing market.

125163.explanation: Tailor-made solutions must be applied here. Many of our holiday homes are remote without social supervision.

125164.explanation: This depends on applicable nature and landscape values.

125167.explanation: Too many working people find it difficult to make ends meet. These people should be rewarded to make benefits less attractive.

125179.explanation: Depends on the type of waste and the associated costs.

125184.explanation: Vaals, Vijlen, and Lemiers have their own dialects which we must cherish.

125137.explanation: Choosing aldermen is a democratic procedure you should not be forced into. That would NOT be democratic. However, it can be an aspiration or agreement among coalition parties that provide and choose aldermen. We certainly support that beautiful aspiration!

125138.explanation: On important issues, residents should always be able to express their opinion, including via referenda. Be aware that the result of a referendum is not binding for the municipality, nor is it obligatory for the municipal council! It is a collection of opinions, nothing more.

125141.explanation: No, and certainly not ALWAYS. Especially not in our beautiful Heuvelland and our tourist town Vaals and associated villages. It must not and should not become uncontrolled growth, and all aspects and consequences of such an establishment must be considered. The beautiful environment is capital and very important for Vaals.

125144.explanation: The municipality has made agreements, signed contracts, etc., with sound financial planning. Municipalities should also adhere to their agreements, as recorded in contracts, both towards citizens and businesses and other entities. Politics should be reliable and transparent.

125146.explanation: Environmentally and air polluting. Many elderly people, people with respiratory or lung (COPD) problems, the sick and vulnerable suffer directly from it. Poor air quality also affects the health of healthy people in the long term. The damage to people, environment, and nature is too important to us!

125147.explanation: Terrace heating should be allowed. The criterion should be what powers the heating. Green electricity should certainly not be an objection. Therefore, the possible damage to and burden on the environment should be considered. And of course, all safety aspects must be strictly monitored.

125150.explanation: We think the problem lies more in the fact that existing rules are not consistently and visibly enforced. With proper enforcement of noise standards, stricter measures are not necessary. So first step: consistent, more frequent, and clearly recognizable inspections! And then re-evaluate!

125151.explanation: There must be a benevolent permit policy. Regarding financial aid, this must be assessed case by case. A cost-benefit analysis. What are the additional possibilities and their costs? How many people with disabilities do we help (extra) with that amount?

125154.explanation: Absolutely agree. Our children spend 8-10 years there, many hours per year. They spend a large part of their youth there and it is, next to the family, the focal point of their lives. The school buildings must be good, well ventilated, warm in winter, cool in summer! Light and spacious. Of course, with good sanitary facilities.

125158.explanation: We do not think there are not enough enforcement officers (boa's). Certainly not regarding safety. Also, considering costs and benefits, there are more, better, and cheaper technical options. Mediators and training volunteers in sports, youth, and community work can also contribute greatly!

125159.explanation: Yes, this brings safety and prevention to the municipality and also provides a reassuring and safe feeling for citizens and tourists traveling in Vaals. Add good lighting everywhere to this! The combined effect of these two is great and relatively inexpensive!

125162.explanation: (Older) residents of Vaals have priority. Old trees should not be transplanted because of their social connection to the municipality. Vaals has been their 'home' for decades! But also because they then free up (often larger) housing for younger people (from Vaals?). Win-win situation!

125163.explanation: No, holiday homes are often not built for permanent residence, and permanent residence often overloads the infrastructure of a holiday park. Additionally, Vaals needs these holiday homes for its guests because tourism is an important source of income. They bring a lot of money to Vaals.

125164.explanation: Each permit application must be examined very carefully. Where and how? Does the location fit in the landscape or not? Does it damage the landscape, the view, and how the environment is changed by the construction? Does it negatively affect the environment or the habitat present there?

125166.explanation: Waiving these taxes for people with a truly low income is a form of help or assistance for people with very low incomes. Abolishing this generally is drastic and has undesired social consequences. It is better to look at the criteria for this and strictly monitor them!

125167.explanation: In the Netherlands, 1.2 million people (including 500,000 children) cannot make ends meet. Life, shopping, everything is becoming more expensive. The number of people who are multiple times millionaires is also growing! The gap between rich and poor in the Netherlands is increasing rapidly. We must help and raise the income threshold for assistance.

125171.explanation: The criterion should be to offer qualitatively good care just like for all those other people with their beliefs, their convictions, and from other cultures. If it can be realized, that is okay, but it should not be MANDATORY, thus not imposing an enforceable duty on healthcare and our society.

125173.explanation: The property tax (OZB) should be scaled upward. The more luxurious and expensive the house, the higher the WOZ value and the higher the tax should be scaled accordingly. There should be different tax rates for houses and properties with a WOZ value up to €350,000, for the portion between €350,000 and €550,000, and for homes with a WOZ above €550,000!

125174.explanation: Scaling should also be introduced here. For example: the first dog should not be heavily taxed. For multiple dogs in one household, the tax should progressively increase for each additional dog within that household.

125175.explanation: Tourist tax 'fills' the municipal coffers but also indirectly selects the type of tourists who visit, stay, or overnight in Vaals—the tourists who are more willing to spend. The entire tourism sector, including hospitality and accommodation branches, benefits from this.

125179.explanation: Yes! And the costs of this must be charged to general taxes so that people do not have a financial incentive to illegally dump (or litter) their waste.

125184.explanation: We think it is better to focus in regular education on truly important subjects: Dutch, English and other languages, computer and IT, biology, physics and chemistry, sports, and swimming. We see the Völzer dialect more as a hobby activity, possibly subsidized.

125185.explanation: Allow it. There is already definitely trade in these products, also in Vaals. We would prefer to see it in a coffeeshop, subject to rules and controls. Why should an adult turn to illegal suppliers or sales points for these products if it can also be legal locally?

125189.explanation: Extending the opening hours of the existing parking garage and encouraging its use makes additional parking spaces in the center unnecessary, especially since the parking garage in the center is currently only about half full.

125191.explanation: There are several advantages. Children receive a healthy breakfast daily, something not all children get at home. They socialize better because there is more interaction among children and with adult teachers, and in a very different setting. This is good, better for their development.

125192.explanation: However, we believe this should be left to the existing local entrepreneurs who are already active in this field. This could be discussed and encouraged with them, seeking cooperation. There is no need to reinvent the wheel (for bike sharing). Collaborate with what already exists in Vaals!

125194.explanation: On Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday, two hours of free parking in the garage. On these three days, the two-hour free parking would benefit the citizens and businesses of Vaals. On busier days with many visitors from outside Vaals, however, not! The municipality can use that income well.

125137.explanation: Rigidly fixing this is unwise. It does not even matter whether the council consists entirely of women or men; what matters is the best quality for the residents.

125146.explanation: We do believe that the local regulation (APV) can include a provision prohibiting fuels that cause nuisance, such as waste/plastic. Also, new wood stoves could be required to meet certain NEN standards.

125150.explanation: In Vaals, we have introduced rules that form a good compromise. Occasionally, residents will have to accept some nuisance for the benefit of another group for whom the noise may not be loud enough. Life is about give and take.

125151.explanation: If entrepreneurs do not want to miss guests/customers, they will have to ensure this themselves. The costs will usually be limited; often a wooden structure at the entrance is already sufficient.

125154.explanation: If a primary school in the municipality of Vaals has shortcomings, the municipality must naturally fix this. Our children deserve an optimal learning and living environment. We do not live in a third-world country.

125158.explanation: There is a feeling of insecurity; especially now that the police are withdrawing. This feeling must be eliminated.

125162.explanation: Whereby we note that the municipality's own residents will get priority in housing allocation. In many cases, this also frees up (larger) houses that younger residents of our municipality can then buy or rent.

125163.explanation: Again, with priority for our own (young) residents. This relieves pressure on the local housing market. Our children will not have to live with their parents until their thirties.

125164.explanation: "Infill development" is preferred, but here and there there are suitable locations to build outside the core. The landscape must obviously not be damaged in doing so.

125166.explanation: Where help is needed, we are happy to assist. On an annual basis, the municipality of Vaals writes off approximately €200,000.

125167.explanation: We have already raised this income limit in the municipality of Vaals to 120% (you may earn 20% more than social assistance and still qualify for all poverty schemes). That settles it for us.

125171.explanation: You are in the Netherlands, so just adapt to our culture!

125174.explanation: An interesting issue. Although this tax goes to general funds, our municipality already does a lot for our dogs: free poop bags, walking areas, and waste bins.

125175.explanation: We must not price ourselves out of the market! The recent VAT increase on recreational stays makes us incredibly expensive compared to Aachen or Plombières/Kelmis.

125185.explanation: This would lead to major problems due to our border location.

125189.explanation: We even have a parking garage that is mostly not full.

125192.explanation: We had that and perhaps a new provider will come this year. The municipality should not do this; the private sector is better equipped for it.

125137.explanation: Aldermen should primarily excel in professional expertise.

125138.explanation: In principle yes, but some subjects are too abstract.

125141.explanation: We support farm campgrounds. But we also want nature to be preserved and we need quiet areas.

125144.explanation: The municipality does not have authority over this.

125146.explanation: No nuisance from stoves is known.

125147.explanation: The hospitality industry should decide that themselves.

125151.explanation: The municipality can support by providing faster and cheaper permit processing.

125158.explanation: It would not be a bad thing.

125162.explanation: Vaals is already a frontrunner in the number of small rental homes.

125163.explanation: Holiday cottages in Vaals are fully booked.

125164.explanation: The rural area is reserved for nature.

125166.explanation: Then the problem shifts somewhere else.

125167.explanation: This has already increased to 120 percent.

125171.explanation: It will be difficult to achieve this, especially given the waiting lists.

125173.explanation: Homeowners are already facing many costs and it is already quite high.

125174.explanation: We also do a lot for dogs, such as laying out pastures and providing dog waste bins. This also needs to be paid for somehow.

125175.explanation: We want to offer higher quality to tourists, and a small increase fits with that. Only if necessary.

125184.explanation: This is part of the cultural agenda and the identity of the region.

125185.explanation: Supporting the use of soft drugs is not a good idea. Its effects are becoming increasingly severe. We respect people's freedom but should not offer it.

125189.explanation: Too few parking spaces have been created.

125191.explanation: There is a lot of poverty in Vaals and this is certainly not a luxury.

125192.explanation: This can be undertaken by entrepreneurs.

125194.explanation: This is not a measure that makes much difference.

statements.title: The municipality must make the first hour free every day in the parking garage in the center of Vaals.
The new college of mayor and aldermen must have an equal number of men and women.

titleParts.glossary: The college of mayor and aldermen, the municipality’s executive board.
The mayor leads the municipality and chairs the municipal council. The mayor is not elected but appointed by the national government, after recommendation by the municipal council.

titleParts.text: en wethouders moet het aantal mannen en vrouwen gelijk zijn.

statements.title: The municipality should always allow farmers to open, for example, a shop or a campsite at their farm.
The municipality must ban outdoor patio heaters.
The asylum reception center in our municipality should be closed as soon as possible.

titleParts.glossary: A place where people who have applied for asylum are accommodated. An asylum shelter can be temporary. A permanent asylum shelter is called an asylum seekers' centre (azc).

titleParts.text: in onze gemeente moet zo snel mogelijk sluiten.

statements.title: The municipality should financially help business owners to make their buildings accessible to people with disabilities.

titleParts.text: helpen om hun gebouw toegankelijker te maken voor mensen met een

titleParts.glossary: Something that limits you in daily life. A disability can be physical or intellectual or relate to hearing or sight, or combinations of these.

statements.title: The municipality must allow holiday homes to be used as a permanent residence.
The municipality must set up its own bike-share system.
The residents of Vaals must be able to give their opinion on important issues via a referendum.

titleParts.text: De inwoners van Vaals moeten over belangrijke onderwerpen hun mening kunnen geven via een

titleParts.glossary: A public consultation where residents can express their opinion on a political issue. The municipal council is not obliged to follow the result; legally it cannot.

statements.title: The use of open fireplaces and wood-burning stoves in Vaals must remain permitted.

titleParts.text: In Vaals moet het gebruik van open haarden en

titleParts.glossary: Wood-burning stoves used to heat a home.

statements.title: The municipality should invest money in improving all school buildings during the next council term.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet in de komende

titleParts.glossary: The municipal council is elected for a period of four years.

titleParts.text: geld steken in het verbeteren van alle schoolgebouwen.

statements.title: People who need care should always be able to choose a caregiver who matches their religion, culture, or beliefs.

titleParts.text: Mensen die zorg nodig hebben, moeten altijd kunnen kiezen voor een zorgverlener die past bij hun geloof, cultuur of

titleParts.glossary: What someone believes about life, such as a religion or personal conviction.

statements.title: Vaals must have more municipal enforcement officers (BOAs) who deal with public safety.

titleParts.glossary: People who, for the municipality, check whether citizens and businesses comply with the rules.

titleParts.text: (boa’s) komen die zich met veiligheid bezighouden.

statements.title: The municipality should raise the income threshold for receiving poverty assistance.
The municipality must make it possible for all primary schools to include the Völser dialect in their lessons.
There must be more camera surveillance in Vaals.

titleParts.glossary: Monitoring of a building, area, or (groups of) people using security cameras.

statements.title: The property tax (ozb) should be increased.

titleParts.glossary: Tax you pay as the owner of a building or piece of land, or as the user of a commercial property.
Property tax. Tax you pay as the owner of a building or piece of land, or as the user of a commercial property.

statements.title: The municipality should prevent new construction outside existing village boundaries.
The tourist tax should be increased.

titleParts.glossary: The tax you must pay when you stay overnight in a hotel or at a campsite.

statements.title: The municipality should abolish the dog tax.

titleParts.glossary: Tax paid to the municipality for owning one or more dogs.

statements.title: Dropping off waste at the recycling center should be free of charge.

titleParts.text: Het inleveren van afval bij de

titleParts.glossary: A place where citizens and businesses can bring different kinds of waste.

statements.title: More parking spaces should be created in the center.
The municipality should allow the establishment of a coffeeshop.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet de vestiging van een

titleParts.glossary: Shop or café where you can buy and smoke soft drugs (hash, weed).

statements.title: The municipality should stop forgiving municipal taxes for low-income residents.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet stoppen met het

titleParts.glossary: That people no longer have to pay for something.
Taxes you have to pay to the municipality (e.g., sewer charge, waste disposal charge, dog tax).

titleParts.text: voor inwoners met een laag inkomen.

statements.title: Noise standards at festivals and parties must be made stricter.
Vaals must build more small rental and owner-occupied homes for the elderly.
The municipality of Vaals must make a free school breakfast available at all primary schools.
